values: Test on the systematic effect of the Conditions
Condition averages are compared with reference distribution
Numeric results MUST be in base units of the International System of Quantities (multiples and submultiples are not allowed).
Degrees of freedom of y, n(y)
Show the main factors to be considered to reduce the uncertainty (most impacting)
Show the main factors to be considered to reduce the costs (least impacting)
Make the hypothesis of a change in the main uncertainty factor and evaluate its effect

text: increment evaluated a hundreth of the standard deviation of the independent variable.

values: Let us consider two devices D1 and D2.

The device D1 is made by three critical pieces a, b and c, such that even if only one of them is defective, then the device does not work. If the piece a is defective with probability Pa, and similarly Pb for piece b and Pc for piece c, what is the probability that the device D1 does not work?

The device D2 is made by two critical pieces v and w, such that if at least one of them works, then the device works. If the piece v is defective with probability Pv, and similarly Pw for piece w, what is the probability that the device D2 does not work?
What is the maximum value of the probability of defects for piece a such that the probability that the device D1 does not work is lower or equal than the target probability Pt?
Probability that the device D1 does not work
Probability that the device D2 does not work
Maximum value of the probability of defects for piece a such that the probability that the device D1 does not work is lower or equal than the target probability Pt?
